title: Many questions to EoE for all you pros SPOILERS
display_title: Many questions to EoE for all you pros SPOILERS
wikitext:
[]: Many questions to EoE for all you pros (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 10:12 am Note: if this belongs in "in depth" just move it. Wasn't sure. Questions: 1. Asuka is in a coma, is this because she was mind raped by Arael? 2. Rei is shown standing above masato when she dies. Any meaning to this? 3. Ritsuko pulls a gun on gendo? Gendo mutters something after he says her name, do we every know what he is saying there? Lip readers? lol 4. Seele obviously wanted to bring about the third impact and "evangelize" the human race. What does Seele see wrong with the current human race? Is it impure to them because it was derived from Lilith? 5. We see the third impact as an eye, an significance? And was this just the first stage of the impact (the big explosion)? I am basically wondering why there was the first explosion instead of all hell going loose at once with the "tang" bit lol. 6. The egg of lilith is where all life started after the second impact correct? 7. Rei rejects Gendo? Reasons? I believe she wanted to reunite her soul of Lilith with the true body and reject being a puppet? That correct? What the truck happens to Gendo? 8. After little Shinji beats down this sand caste of (I forget what the building is called, the pyramid), we see 2 suns with odd L shapers around them, any significance? 9. Who was Shinji watching while holding Misato's cross? Was it Misato and Kaji I am to assume? 10. The whole choking Asuka thing was in his head I assume correct? 11. When the "tang" scene occurred, what was the purpose of everyone seeing their, I suppose, one person they really liked/cared about? 12. When they get "tanged", their spine is still there (as evidence with the last member of Seele)? 13. Does anyone know of a person or site that has a compilation of the fast images at the end of the film at about 1:12:00? 14. Was the audience at the end the screening of the film? 15. If the third impact did really complete unlike the ending, would humans be reborn again from lilith or stay in that pseudo LCL world that Shinji made up ? Thoughts? 16. We see the 9 eva series return to earth at the end? What do you think happened to them? A jesus on the cross motif? (when they are on the shore at the end in the red sea). 17. What the hell happened to eva 01 at the end? 18. What is the red line in the sky when Asuka and Shinji are laying there? 19. Why o why did Shinji try to actually strangle Asuka at the end (similar to in his mind earlier in the movie). 20. As before when they go to Alaska we see the red sea, why is this red? And yes I am an Eva n00b in a sense, be gentle! XD. PLEASE Respond with the number of what you are responding to. I know you guys get tired of n00bs asking the same things, but you are really helping me to better understand Eva and become a better fan. P.S. The end with the giant Rei head made me think of Plant of the Apes, oh jeez haha. Thanks Eva geeks! :B

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 21, 2010 10:35 am 1. Here 2. Here 3. This thread contains a post that answers all your subsequent questions: ZapX wrote: Since you're a noob, you should learn to use our search function. Here is a list of threads. Please LURK MOAR before making topics in the future.

[]:             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 10:42 am Apologies, I will def. do that. Don't worry Ill learn as I'm here more, thanks for putting up with my "n00b ness" Funny thing is those posts you gave me only answered a few things, but I guess I will have to search for the other answers grr. OH well

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Apr 21, 2010 11:29 am ProfessorKaos64 wrote: but I guess I will have to search for the other answers grr. OH well

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:19 pm Most of this questions are answered by actually watching the show.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:23 pm Allemann wrote: Most of this questions are answered by actually watching the show.

[]: Re: Many questions to EoE for all you pros (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by J_Faulkner » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:51 pm 1. Nobody knows. 2. Yes, Rei is some mystical life source thing associated with death in some way. 3. Nobody knows. 4. Why would the human race be impure if it was from Lillith? 5. Eyes are the window to the soul; probably. 6. No, it's where all humans originated apparently. 7. Yes; individuality; probably; probably; loses physical existence and not sure what happens afterwards. 8. L shapers? 9. Not sure. 10. Everything came from Anno's head. 11. Everyone's thoughts are spilling out into the open. 12. No. 13. You could capture the images yourself with suitable video programs. 14. Yes. 15. Third Impact was an impact and was completed. 16. Don't know; don't care. I did not recall Jesus being on the cross near the red sea. 17. Existing somewhere for all eternity as allusion to some eternal soul-like thing. 18. Halley's Comet? 19. Because part of him detests her. 20. Why not? ProfessorKaos wrote: I know you guys get tired of n00bs asking the same things, but you are really helping me to better understand Eva and become a better fan.

[]: Re: Many questions to EoE for all you pros (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 21, 2010 3:01 pm 1. Asuka is in a coma, is this because she was mind raped by Arael? After being hauled out of the bathtub where she may have slashed her wrists on learning of Kaji's death, she was kept under sedation (as noted in EoE, when the treatment is discontinued as part of loading her into EVA-02) 2. Rei is shown standing above masato when she dies. Any meaning to this? Harvesting her soul 3. Ritsuko pulls a gun on gendo? Gendo mutters something after he says her name, do we every know what he is saying there? Lip readers? lol Himitsu des' 4. What does Seele see wrong with the current human race? What pretty any bunch of elitist apocalyptic types do. 5. We see the third impact as an eye, an significance? Probably not, just the GeoFront being ripped out from its moorings would give that sort of geometry 6. The egg of lilith is where all life started after the second impact correct? Yes 7. Rei rejects Gendo? Reasons? I believe she wanted to reunite her soul of Lilith with the true body and reject being a puppet? That correct? What the truck happens to Gendo? Yes for Rei; Gendo perhaps gets uploaded into EVA-01 8. After little Shinji beats down this sand caste of (I forget what the building is called, the pyramid), we see 2 suns with odd L shapers around them, any significance? Perhaps http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4923 9. Who was Shinji watching while holding Misato's cross? Was it Misato and Kaji I am to assume? Misatos memory of that week which Ritsuko alluded to in episode 21 10. The whole choking Asuka thing was in his head I assume correct? In the kitchen, yes, as some form of metaphorical replay of what happened in episode 24'; on the beach was back in objective space. 11. When the "tang" scene occurred, what was the purpose of everyone seeing their, I suppose, one person they really liked/cared about? http://wiki.evageeks.org/Geektionary#Transition_Guide 12. When they get "tanged", their spine is still there (as evidence with the last member of Seele)? Those were his cyborg bits 13. Does anyone know of a person or site that has a compilation of the fast images at the end of the film at about 1:12:00? Probably someone around here does 14. Was the audience at the end the screening of the film? The première of Death & Rebirth, IIRC 15. If the third impact did really complete unlike the ending, would humans be reborn again from lilith or stay in that pseudo LCL world that Shinji made up ? Thoughts? Depends whose scenario played out. At one extreme, you could get just the one hive-soul gazing at its collective navel. 16. We see the 9 eva series return to earth at the end? What do you think happened to them? A jesus on the cross motif? (when they are on the shore at the end in the red sea). Apocalyptic imagery, certainly, after they were petrified by Yui's final acts with Earth. 17. What the hell happened to eva 01 at the end? Sailed off into the cosmos to become another Seed of Life (perhaps a long and belated honeymoon cruise for the Ikaris). 18. What is the red line in the sky when Asuka and Shinji are laying there? Probably the jet of stuff sprayed from Giant Naked Rei's neck. 19. Why o why did Shinji try to actually strangle Asuka at the end (similar to in his mind earlier in the movie). Too many threads to cite here -- look for titles with references to the last scene of EoE. 20. As before when they go to Alaska we see the red sea, why is this red? A result of SEELE's Red Earth ritual; also related to the reddening of the Antarctic sea after Adam's anti-ATF went off (dissolved life-forms).

[]:             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 4:36 pm Mr tines you have my undying gratitude. I am hitting the wiki tonight, but you sir are a gentleman for being so awesome. Yes yes, I will search MOAR in the future, but thank you for your awesome job.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Apr 22, 2010 5:41 pm Nanomachines A Wizard Did it etc

[]: Re: Many questions to EoE for all you pros (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 23, 2010 1:52 am Mr. Tines wrote: 2. Rei is shown standing above masato when she dies. Any meaning to this? Harvesting her soul

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Apr 23, 2010 2:04 am No, Second Impact. That's the earliest moment seen on camera, and therefore clearly the beginning of the Evangelion universe.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Apr 23, 2010 3:20 am Legendary wrote: No, Second Impact. That's the earliest moment seen on camera, and therefore clearly the beginning of the Evangelion universe.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 23, 2010 5:31 am What about the beginning of the OP, which depicts the origin of the universe itself?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 23, 2010 12:44 pm Reichu wrote: What about the beginning of the OP, which depicts the origin of the universe itself?

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Fri Apr 23, 2010 1:01 pm Reichu wrote: What about the beginning of the OP, which depicts the origin of the universe itself?

[]: Re: Many questions to EoE for all you pros (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Apr 23, 2010 11:24 pm 1. No, Asuka tried to OD on sleeping medications, but only did a halfway job. 2. Rei has a snuff fetish. 3. He's saying, "Good...bad....I'm the guy with the gun." 4. The problem with the human race is that it's the human race. 5. Third Impact is watching you pee. 6. Yes, the first single-celled organism hatched from a 50km+ egg. 7. Rei has a snuff fetish. She kills Gendo, and decides to have a field day with humanity. 8. The suns are trying to burn down the stage using lens flares. 9. He was admiring the amazing mechanical workings of the fan in that room. 10. Shinji secretly loves Asuka, and seeing her failure to complete a job she obviously wanted to do, he finished it for her, being the caring secret stalker he is. 11. It was just going to prove that humanity is a race of super stalkers who will stop at nothing to mess with other people's heads. 12. The new human race is a spineless mass of quivering jelly. 13. lol 14. lololol 15. They choose option three: vanish in a puff of logic. 16. They turned to stone, obviously. 17. It decided to beat the Voyagers in a race to outer space. 18. The sky was BLEEDING. 19. He realized he STILL hadn't finished the job. 20. Because it's the Red Sea, dude.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 23, 2010 11:29 pm ran1 wrote: Anyway, does the OP even count as "canon" [...]?
